description: Route engineering work before execution. Use when a user is starting a feature, bug fix, hotfix, product, migration, or refactor and the next phase or workflow is unclear, or when they are unsure where to begin. Do not use for ongoing work, debugging, trivial edits, direct commands, PR review, or pure questions.

results.query: 帮我搞一下这个项目，我也不太确定从哪开始。大概是想做一个内部工具，让运营团队可以自己配置推送规则而不用每次找开发改代码
我们的老系统是 PHP 5.6 写的单体应用，现在要逐步迁移到 Go 微服务架构。数据库从 MySQL 迁到 PostgreSQL。团队有 8 个人，预计耗时 6 个月
想花两个 sprint 专门搞 tech debt，CI pipeline 跑了 45 分钟，test coverage 才 30%，一堆 deprecated API calls 要清理。team lead 已经 approve 了 capacity
I want to build a personal finance tracker app from scratch. It should have expense categorization, budget alerts, and bank API integration via Plaid. I'm a solo dev, thinking React + Node
刚加入这个 team，发现整个 codebase 200k lines 完全没有 documentation，README 是空的，architecture docs 也没有。我想先把 docs 搞起来再开始 contribute code
